name: Spaghetti Alla Carbonara
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Peccorino Romano cheese, freshly grated
freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pancetta or bacon into thin strips.
2. In a saucepan or small sauté pan, heat olive oil and butter over medium-high heat.
3. Add crushed garlic and cook until it turns deep gold in color. Remove and discard the garlic.
4. Add pancetta or bacon to the pan and sauté until crisp at the edges.
5. Add white wine and let it boil away for a minute or two, then turn off the heat.
6. In a large pot, bring 4 quarts of water to a boil and add salt. Cook vermicelli until firm to the bite, then drain.
7. In a bowl, beat three eggs and mix with grated cheeses, pepper, and parsley.
8. Combine cooked vermicelli and egg-cheese mixture in the serving bowl.
9. Reheat pancetta or bacon over high heat, then pour everything back into the bowl.
10. Toss thoroughly until well coated, and serve immediately.
